verses.sanskrit: तथा तासां वदन्तीनां परुषं दारुणं बहु ।राक्षसीनामसौम्यानां रुरोद जनकात्मजा ।। ५.२५.१।।।।
verses.text: As those ogre woman with a cruel nature were speaking a lot harshly and horribly, Seetha cried.

verses.sanskrit: एवमुक्ता तु वैदेही राक्षसीभिर्मनस्विनी ।उवाच परमत्रस्ता बाष्पगद्गदया गिरा ।। ५.२५.२।।।।
verses.text:
Thus being spoken to by ogre women, Seetha with a good mind being frightened a lot spoke as follows 
with a voice indistinct due to tears.

verses.sanskrit: न मानुषी राक्षसस्य भार्या भवितुमर्हति ।कामं खादत मां सर्वा न करिष्यामि वो वचः ।। ५.२५.३।।।।
verses.text:
"A human woman is not suited to become a wife of an ogre. All of you eat me according to your desire. 
I will not do according to your words."

verses.sanskrit: सा राक्षसीमध्यगता सीता सुरसुतोपमा ।न शर्म लेभे दुःखार्ता रावणेन च तर्जिता ।। ५.२५.४।।।।
verses.text:
Being in the middle of ogre women, being frightened by Ravana also, like a daughter of gods, that 
Seetha did not get comfort being tormented by grief.

verses.sanskrit: वेपते स्माधिकं सीता विशन्तीवाङ्गमात्मनः ।वने यूथपरिभ्रष्टा मृगी कोकैरिवार्दिता ।। ५.२५.५।।।।
verses.text:
Like a fawn in a forest lost from its herd and tormented by wolves, Seetha was as though sinking 
into own body and shook a lot.

verses.sanskrit: सा त्वशोकस्य विपुलां शाखामालम्ब्य पुष्पिताम् ।चिन्तयामास शोकेन भर्तारं भग्नमानसा ।। ५.२५.६।।।।
verses.text:
That Seetha with a broken heart due to grief, held a wide flowering branch of Ashoka tree and thought 
about Her husband.

verses.sanskrit: सा स्नापयन्ती विपुलौ स्तनौ नेत्रजलस्रवैः ।चिन्तयन्ती न शोकस्य तदा ऽन्तमधिगच्छति ।। ५.२५.७।।।।
verses.text:
Then that Seetha washing Her wide breasts with a flow of tears from eyes and thinking, did not 
get end of sorrow.

verses.sanskrit: सा वेपमाना पतिता प्रवाते कदली यथा ।राक्षसीनां भयत्रस्ता विवर्णवदना ऽभवत् ।। ५.२५.८।।।।
verses.text:
That Seetha was shaking like a plantain tree fallen down in an exceedingly windy place, trembling 
with fear of the ogre women, and became with a pale face.

verses.sanskrit: तस्याः सा दीर्घविपुला वेपन्त्या सीतया तदा ।ददृशे कम्पिनी वेणी व्यालीव परिसर्पती ।। ५.२५.९।।।।
verses.text:
That moving plait, which was wide and long, of that best woman was seen to be like a serpant in 
motion.

verses.sanskrit: सा निःश्वसन्ती दुःखार्ता शोकोपहतचेतना ।आर्ता व्यसृजदश्रूणि मैथिली विललाप ह ।। ५.२५.१०।।।।
verses.text:
That Seetha tormented by grief, with a mind hit by sorrow, struck by calamity was sighing and let 
down tears and also cried.

verses.sanskrit: रा रामेति च दूःखार्ता हा पुनर्लक्ष्मणेति च ।हा श्वश्रु मम कौसल्ये हा सुमित्रेति भामिनी ।। ५.२५.११।।।।
verses.text:
Seetha being tormented by grief said : "Oh! Rama!" and again "Oh! Lakshmana!","Oh! Kausalya!, my 
mother-in-law" "Oh! Sumitra!"

verses.sanskrit: लोकप्रवादः सत्यो ऽयं पण्डितैः समुदाहृतः ।अकाले दुर्लभो मृत्युः स्त्रिया वा पुरुषस्य वा ।। ५.२५.१२।।।।
verses.text:
"I thus being tormented by cruel ogre women here lacking Rama, being tormented by grief, when I 
am living even for a moment,' death at wrong time to woman or to a man is hard' - thus being said this popular 
saying in the world is true."

verses.sanskrit: यत्राहमेवं क्रूराभी राक्षसीभिरिहार्दिता ।जीवामि हीना रामेण मुहूर्तमपि दुःखिता ।। ५.२५.१३।।।।
एषा ऽल्पपुण्या कृपणा विनशिष्याम्यनाथवत् ।समुद्रमध्ये नौः पूर्णा वायुवेगैरिवाहता ।। ५.२५.१४।।।।
verses.text:
"This me with small merit,wreched, like an orphan, will perish like a ship in the middle of the 
ocean being hit by the speed of wind."

verses.sanskrit: भर्तारं तमपश्यन्ती राक्षसीवशमागता ।सीदामि खलु शोकेन कूलं तोयहतं यथा ।। ५.२५.१५।।।।
verses.text:
"Not seeing my husband that Rama and obtaining control of ogre women like a bank hit by water I 
am verily perishing with sorrow."

verses.sanskrit: तं पद्मदलपत्रक्षं सिंहविक्रान्तगामिनम् ।धन्याः पश्यन्ति मे नाथं कृतज्ञं प्रियवादिनम् ।। ५.२५.१६।।।।
verses.text:
"Only fortunate see that my husband with eyes like petals of an expanded lotus, walking with the 
gait of a lion, correct in conduct and a pleasant talker."

verses.sanskrit: सर्वथा तेन हीनाया रामेण विदितात्मना ।तीक्ष्णं विषमिवास्वाद्य दुर्लभं मम जीवितम् ।। ५.२५.१७।।।।
verses.text:
"To me lacking that Rama with a famous soul, like after eating a pungent poison life in all ways 
is hard."

verses.sanskrit: कीदृशं तु मया पापं पुरा जन्मान्तरे कृतम् ।येनेदं प्राप्यते दुःखं मया घोरं सुदारुणम् ।। ५.२५.१८।।।।
verses.text:
"By what this horrible and very dreadful grief is obtained by me, what kind of great sin had been 
done by me in another life."

verses.sanskrit: जीवितं त्यक्तुमिच्छामि शोकेन महता वृता ।राक्षसीभिश्च रक्ष्यन्त्या रामो नासाद्यते मया ।। ५.२५.१९।।।।
verses.text:
"Together with great grief, I desire to give away my life. This desire is not obtainable by me. 
I am well protected by ogre women."

verses.sanskrit: धिगस्तु खलु मानुष्यं धिगस्तु परवश्यताम् ।न शक्यं यत् परित्यक्तुमात्मच्छन्देन जीवितम् ।। ५.२५.२०।।
verses.text:
"Fie upon human condition! Fie upon being in the control of others. By what reason it is not possible 
according to own desire to give up life."
